REPLY MEMO IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE OR PRELIMINARY INJUINCTION FILED BY PETITIONER UNION OF AMERICAN PHYSICIANS AND DENTISTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER UNION OF AMERICAN PHYSICIANS AND DENTISTS' MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE OR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT RESPONDENT IS NOT COMPLYING WITH ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE CIVIL SERVICE MANDATE OR THAT THE SPB DECISION REQUIRES EITHER THE RESTORATION OF THE ACUTE CASE UNIT OR ON-SITE NIGHT PHYSICIANS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-16-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CLERK'S NOTICE OF FILING OF NOTICE OF APPEAL

ATTY. THERESA C. WITHERSPOON, TEL. NO. (510) 452-4357 APPEARING FOR SEIU;

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER UNION OF AMERICAN PHYSICIANS AND DENTISTS' Motion For Writ Of Mandate Or Preliminary Injunction IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT RESPONDENT IS NOT COMPLYING WITH ITS OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE CIVIL SERVICE MANDATE OR THAT THE SPB DECISION REQUIRES EITHER THE RESTORATION OF THE ACUTE CASE UNIT OR ON-SITE NIGHT PHYSICIANS. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
